title: ASE Implementation Plan (machine-readable)
description: Authoritative payload for tooling when paired with IP-XXX.md. See 01_02_process_description.md for the Markdown + JSON contract.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema document (not the IP revision).

title.description: Short human-readable title; mirrors the Markdown heading when present.

a_ucp_score.description: Agent Use Case Points total for this plan (see 05_01_software_sizing_description.md).

files_to_modify.description: Repository-relative paths the plan is allowed to touch.

worker_routing.description: worker: a single worker agent may execute this IP. orchestrator_only: must split into Sub-IPs and delegate (e.g. high A-UCP); see 05_01.

markdown_path.description: Path to the human-readable IP Markdown file, relative to the project repository root.

json_path.description: Path to this JSON file when stored on disk.
